title: Property Search & Sourcing
summary: We access the full market - including off-market and pre-market properties - to find homes that match your exact brief. Up to 30% of our purchases never appear on Rightmove.

title: Negotiation & Offer Strategy
summary: Our agents have negotiated hundreds of UK purchases and know exactly how to position your offer to win at the right price. Average client saving: £14,200 per transaction.

title: Due Diligence & Research
summary: We dig deep into every property - planning history, flood risk, structural issues, comparable sales, and local market dynamics - so you buy with complete confidence and no surprises.

title: Legal & Survey Coordination
summary: We manage your solicitor, surveyor, and mortgage broker from offer to completion. One point of contact, no chasing, no gaps in communication.

title: Relocation Service
summary: Moving from overseas or another city? We cover everything from area research and school catchment analysis to removals coordination and council registration. Fully remote capability.

title: Investment Portfolio Building
summary: Building a buy-to-let or HMO portfolio? We source high-yield properties, model rental returns, and structure acquisitions for long-term capital and income growth.

title: New Build Purchase Specialist
summary: Buying new build? Developers are experienced negotiators. We level the playing field - securing extras, incentives, and price reductions that most buyers never realise are available.

title: Area Research Reports
summary: Considering a new area? We produce detailed area research reports covering price trends, planning pipeline, school data, flood risk, transport, and comparable transactions.
